Memorandum of Understanding (MOU / SPA Pre-Stage)

Purpose
This MOU records the agreed sale terms prior to transfer and sets out the parties’ obligations pending execution of the final sale and transfer documentation.

1. Parties
Seller
Full Name: ______________________________________________
Emirates ID / Passport No.: ______________________________
Address: _______________________________________________

Full Name: ______________________________________________
Emirates ID / Passport No.: ______________________________

Broker
Company: MiCasa Real Estate LLC
Representative: _________________________________________

2. Property Details
Property Address: _______________________________________
Unit / Plot No.: ________________________________________
Title Deed No.: _________________________________________
Property Type: __________________________________________

3. Purchase Price and Payment
Total Purchase Price (AED): _____________________________
Deposit Amount (AED): ___________________________________
Balance Payment Method: _________________________________
Target Transfer Date: ___________________________________

4. Deposit Handling
The deposit shall be held as follows: _____________________
If the Buyer defaults without lawful excuse, the deposit may be forfeited to the Seller subject to applicable law. If the Seller defaults, the deposit shall be returned to the Buyer.

5. Seller Obligations
The Seller shall provide clear title and all required documents, cooperate with authority requirements, and sign transfer documents at the scheduled transfer date.

6. Buyer Obligations
The Buyer shall complete due diligence promptly, secure funds, and attend the transfer appointment with all required documentation.

7. Conditions Precedent
This MOU is subject to:
(a) Verification of title and ownership.
(b) Obtaining required NOCs and authority approvals.
(c) Settlement of any outstanding service charges or liabilities.

8. Default and Remedies
If either party fails to perform, the non-defaulting party may seek remedies available under applicable law, including specific performance or damages.

9. Broker Role and Commission
The Broker facilitated the introduction and negotiation of the transaction. Commission is due upon successful transfer in accordance with the applicable brokerage agreements.

10. Governing Law
This MOU is governed by the laws of the United Arab Emirates and applicable regulations in the Emirate of Abu Dhabi.

11. Entire Agreement
This MOU constitutes the entire agreement between the parties regarding the pre-transfer terms and supersedes prior communications relating to the subject matter.
